creator: kwc@world.std.com
text:
Apparently the manpage database didn't get updated when
FreeBSD updated named from 4.9.x to 8.x.  Actual version of named
in -STABLE appears to be 8.1.2.  (Btw, new named from ISC is
version 8.2.1)

Fix: 

Manually install manpage(s) from ISC BIND(?)
How-To-Repeat: man named
